test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient: tactical source-inspection tests cover the BattleSim modal launcher path and FBattleScreen constructor-owned FTacticalGame/WXTacticalUI contract, and `cd tests/tactical && make && ./TacticalTests` passed with `OK (74 tests)`.
documentation_accuracy_summary: Accurate: doc/DesignNotes.md records regression coverage only, matches the implemented tests, and cites the confirmed `OK (74 tests)` result without overstating architecture changes.
